pilot_name: ERP for One-Person Company — Monthly Financial Close

t1.name: Manage Financial Close
t1.definition: Ensure the one-person company completes monthly financial close accurately, completely, and on time with minimal human intervention.

t2.name: Import Bank Statements
t2.definition: Retrieve and ingest bank transaction data into the ledger system for the closing period.

universal_steps.define: Identify the bank accounts and date range for the period
universal_steps.locate: Connect to bank data source (CSV, OFX, API)
universal_steps.prepare: Parse and normalize transactions into standard format
universal_steps.execute: Write normalized transactions to the journal
universal_steps.monitor: Verify record count matches source, detect duplicates
universal_steps.modify: Flag anomalies (missing dates, zero amounts) for human review
universal_steps.conclude: Confirm all transactions ingested; emit completion signal

t2.name: Reconcile Accounts
t2.definition: Match bank transactions against ledger entries, identify discrepancies, and surface unmatched items.

universal_steps.define: Determine accounts and tolerance rules for matching
universal_steps.locate: Load bank transactions and corresponding ledger entries
universal_steps.execute: Mark matched pairs; isolate unmatched items
universal_steps.monitor: Calculate match rate; flag if below threshold
universal_steps.modify: Propose matching suggestions for ambiguous items; escalate to human if confidence < threshold
universal_steps.conclude: Emit reconciliation report with matched/unmatched/suggested counts

t2.name: Post Adjustment Entries
t2.definition: Create and post adjusting journal entries to resolve discrepancies found during reconciliation.

universal_steps.define: Identify required adjustments from reconciliation output
universal_steps.locate: Retrieve relevant account balances and prior adjustments
universal_steps.prepare: Draft journal entries with debit/credit pairs
universal_steps.execute: Post entries to ledger (requires human approval if amount > threshold)
universal_steps.monitor: Verify debits equal credits; check account balance impact
universal_steps.modify: If approval denied, revise entry and re-submit
universal_steps.conclude: All adjustments posted or explicitly deferred with reason

t2.name: Generate Trial Balance
t2.definition: Produce trial balance report showing all account balances after adjustments, confirming debits equal credits.

universal_steps.define: Set reporting period and chart of accounts scope
universal_steps.locate: Aggregate all posted entries for the period
universal_steps.execute: Generate trial balance with total debits and total credits
universal_steps.monitor: Verify total debits == total credits (zero tolerance)
universal_steps.modify: If imbalanced, trace to source entry and flag for correction
universal_steps.conclude: Emit balanced trial balance; mark ready for close

t2.name: Close Period
t2.definition: Lock the accounting period to prevent further modifications, archive the period state.

universal_steps.define: Confirm all prerequisites met (reconciled, balanced, approved)
universal_steps.locate: Check for any pending items or unapproved entries
universal_steps.prepare: Generate period summary and close checklist
universal_steps.monitor: Verify no entries can be posted to locked period
universal_steps.modify: If human rejects close, report blocking issues
universal_steps.conclude: Period archived; emit close confirmation with timestamp

t1_program.description: Autonomous agent that executes the monthly financial close process for a one-person company, escalating to human only for approvals and ambiguous decisions.

capabilities.name: ingest_bank_data
capabilities.description: Parse and import bank statement files (CSV, OFX, MT940) into normalized journal entries
capabilities.output: list of normalized transactions with status

capabilities.name: reconcile_entries
capabilities.description: Match bank transactions to ledger entries using amount, date, and reference matching
capabilities.escalation_trigger: match_rate < 80% or ambiguous matches with confidence < 0.7

capabilities.name: draft_adjustments
capabilities.description: Generate adjusting journal entries to resolve reconciliation discrepancies
capabilities.output: list of draft journal entries (debit/credit pairs)
capabilities.escalation_trigger: adjustment amount > configured threshold, novel account combination

capabilities.name: generate_trial_balance
capabilities.description: Aggregate all entries and produce trial balance report

capabilities.name: close_period
capabilities.description: Lock accounting period after all prerequisites verified
capabilities.output: close_confirmation with timestamp and archive reference
capabilities.escalation_trigger: always (human approval required for period lock)

crosswalk.notes: Direct mapping — agent fully executes this step
Agent handles matching; ambiguous cases escalate to human
Agent drafts entries; posting requires human approval above threshold
Agent prepares close; human must approve the lock action
